abilities.name: Pay Offs
abilities.text: When an attack is declared against this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to give the attacker -1 Skl.

abilities.name: Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: Subsidies
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy attack fails targeting this model, this model infuses a (soulstone).

actions.name: Contract Kill
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may draw range and LoS from an ally within 8". Target gains a Shame token.

triggers.name: Glancing Shot
triggers.text: When resolving, instead of gaining a Shame token, this model may have the target gain either an Entranced or Stunned token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Issue Command
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Another ally only. Target declares an action.

triggers.name: Make It Double
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target declares an action.

actions.name: Toxic Workplace
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Shame token.

triggers.name: Overshadowing Presence
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 4" of this model.

triggers.name: Glory of Ridley
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 1-3 from your discard pile.
